rationale: Review 2's generality finding — that IsUnipotent over-inherits [Field k] when only [CommSemiring k] [Ring A] are needed — is clearly correct and actionable against the diff, whereas Review 1's generality finding that AffineAlgGroup should drop to [CommRing k] is likely wrong because Algebra.IsGeometricallyReduced is inherently a field-level concept, so acting on Review 1 would probably break compilation.
